system.description:
### Tier 3 Leader A towering white-armored Geth platform that boosts the combat efficiency of nearby synthetic units. Motives & Tactics: Command, deploy, suppress

#### Features Combat Network - Reaction: When another Geth ally within Far range is targeted by an attack, you can mark a Stress to give the attacker Disadvantage.

Deploy Combat Drone - Action: Spend a Fear to summon a Geth Attack Drone (Tier 1 Minion). It appears within Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.

Siege Protocol - Action: The Prime fires a continuous beam. One target must make a Reaction Roll (Strength 20). On a failure, they take 4d10 ene damage and are pushed back to Far range.

Siege Pulse - Reaction: When you make a successful standard attack against a target, they must mark a shield slot without gaining its benefits.

}}

{{adversary,
